birds.evidence: Pelegrín |author2=Carolina Acosta Hospitaleche |journal=Diversity |volume=14 |issue=4 | page=255 |format=PDF |date=April 2022 |access-date=2026-03-29}} | image = South Shetland-2016-Deception Island–Chinstrap penguin (Pygoscelis antarctica) 04.jpg | image_caption = Deception Island, South Shetland Islands | status = LC | status_system = IUCN3.1 | status_ref = | genus = Pygoscelis | species = antarcticus | authority = (Forster, 1781) | synonyms = * Aptenodytes antarctica Forster, 1781 * Pygoscelis antarctica Turbott, 1990 | range_map = Pygoscelis antarcticus map.svg }} The chinstrap penguin (Pygoscelis antarcticus) is a penguin species that inhabits various islands and shores in the Southern Pacific and the Antarctic Oceans
